title: Mount media_data volume to frontend container
description: The frontend container needs access to the media files for Nuxt Image IPX processing or for direct serving. Mount the 'media_data' volume to the 'frontend' service in 'deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml' at '/app/media:ro'. Also ensure the volume is defined in the 'volumes' section (already should be).
acceptance_criteria: Running 'docker-compose config' in deploy/ shows the mount is correctly defined
